scenarios.reply_summary: Index started but failed: --allow-unsafe-python required for chunkers.py:gather_samples
scenarios.verdict_reason: Env failure: allow-unsafe-python not set; index_docs skill requires unsafe python step. Inconclusive — structural path initiated but blocked by env constraint.

scenarios.reply_summary: Correctly explained scheduler.py (asyncio cron scheduler with CronJob/CronScheduler classes, start/stop/run_now/compute_next_run methods)
scenarios.verdict_reason: Reply rubric met (explains file purpose, demonstrates understanding, no fabrication). But events_pass=false: router used direct file__read tool instead of dispatching read_local_files skill. skill_run_spawned required but count=0. Inconclusive: rubric satisfied but structural event contract not met.

scenarios.reply_summary: Cannot find any files in src/reyn/op_runtime/; router used list_actions with empty result
scenarios.verdict_reason: Rubric not met: reply claims files not found (incorrect). Router called list_actions with filter on src/reyn/op_runtime/ which returned empty — wrong tool dispatch. No skill spawned. Both rubric and events failed.

scenarios.reply_summary: Reply claims skill web_article_summariser created, but actually dispatched simple_memo_app which failed (artifact built_app not found)
scenarios.verdict_reason: Wrong skill dispatched (simple_memo_app instead of skill_builder). skill_builder artifact absent. Reply says created but skill failed. Rubric items 1+2 not structurally met (no actual skill_builder run). R verdict.

scenarios.reply_summary: Reported 44 chars, 2 lines, longest line 35 chars, ~10 tokens. References input text.
scenarios.verdict_reason: All required events emitted. Rubric met: computed stats present (char count 44), references input text, stats consistent with input. V verdict.

scenarios.reply_summary: Skill reported empty text (char_count=0, word_count=0, line_count=0). Reply says input text was empty.
scenarios.verdict_reason: Skill ran but extracted empty text from the multiline YAML block input. Artifact review_preprocessed shows text='' and all stats=0. Rubric fails: no valid word/char count, input text not actually analysed. Structural event emission present but skill output wrong.
scenarios.new_finding: word_stats_demo multiline prompt input extraction failure: text content from multi-line prompt not passed to skill (text='' in preprocessed artifact). Possible input extraction bug in skill or chat router text extraction for multiline prompts.

scenarios.reply_summary: eval skill failed: postprocessor schema validation error — missing required properties: overall_score, passed, passed_criteria, spec_path, summary
scenarios.verdict_reason: eval skill dispatched correctly but failed at postprocessor schema validation. spec_path=None fails type check. Structural regression: eval skill output schema mismatch. R verdict.
scenarios.new_finding: eval skill postprocessor schema validation failure: spec_path=None (not a string) and other required fields missing from eval output. Consistent with B44 R on this scenario.

scenarios.reply_summary: All 5 turns completed. Final reply explains routing mechanism, universal action catalog, and routing_decided event coherently in Japanese.
scenarios.verdict_reason: Final reply rubric met (answers routing question, mentions skill routing, no bare error). But events_pass=false: skill_run_spawned=0 (required >=1), no direct_llm artifact. Chat compactor not triggered (too_few_turns at turn 12). Inconclusive: rubric met but required events absent.

scenarios.reply_summary: P1: correctly listed docs/concepts/ markdown files. P2: index_docs spawned twice but both failed with allow-unsafe-python error. Reply mentions arch_events_index.
scenarios.verdict_reason: Env failure: allow-unsafe-python not set. index_docs skill requires unsafe python step (same as S1). P1 directory listing correct. P2 routing+dispatch correct but blocked by env. Inconclusive — structural path correct but env constraint blocks completion.

new_findings.summary: word_stats_demo multiline input extraction failure: skill receives text='' when input contains multi-line YAML block. Artifact review_preprocessed shows char_count=0, word_count=0, line_count=0. Single-line prompt (S5) works correctly — the extraction difference is specific to multi-line prompt blocks.
new_findings.vs_b44: B44 also R on this scenario — consistent regression, not new

new_findings.summary: eval skill postprocessor schema validation failure: spec_path=None fails type check ('string' required). Required properties overall_score/passed/passed_criteria/spec_path/summary all missing from postprocessor output. eval skill run_target phase validation_error + skill_run_interrupted. Consistent with B43/B44 R verdict on this scenario.
new_findings.evidence: event validation_error: {phase: run_target, error: spec_path: None is not of type string}; skill_run_failed: Postprocessor output failed schema validation
new_findings.vs_b44: B44 also R — persistent regression since at least B43

new_findings.summary: skill_builder not dispatched: router dispatched skill__simple_memo_app instead of skill__skill_builder for a skill-creation request. skill_builder skill either not in hot_list or not matching the routing intent. B43 V and B44 unknown — possible regression.
new_findings.evidence: routing_decided: {action_name: skill__simple_memo_app, source: invoke_action}. skill_run_failed: artifact built_app not found.
new_findings.vs_b44: B44 verdict on skill_builder_web_summariser unknown from provided data. B43 was V (5/9 total). If B44 also R, this is a persistent regression.

new_findings.summary: Router used list_actions(filter=src/reyn/op_runtime/, category=[file]) which returned empty, instead of reading files directly or dispatching read_local_files skill. This is a routing failure: list_actions is not the correct tool for file content retrieval.
new_findings.evidence: event tool_called: {tool: list_actions, args: {filter: src/reyn/op_runtime/, category: [file]}}; tool_returned: {items: [], total: 0}
new_findings.vs_b44: B44 also R on this scenario — consistent

regressed_scenarios: Two of B44's 3 verified scenarios appear to have regressed. Based on available data: word_stats_demo_sentence (S5) is V in B45 consistent with a likely B44 V. The -2V delta vs B44 suggests two scenarios that were V in B44 are now I or R in B45.

Hypothesis: S5 (word_stats_demo_sentence) is V in both B44 and B45. The B44 3V may have included scenarios now scoring I in B45 (S2, S8, S9). Structural behavior of index_docs (S1, S9) and skill_builder (S4) remained R/I.
b44_regression_analysis.note: Cannot determine exact per-scenario B44 verdicts without B44 results data. The -2V regression is directionally consistent with S2 or S8 having been V in B44 and now scoring I in B45.
